examples: I was prepared to be magnanimous, prepared to feel compassion for him.
He was magnanimous in defeat and praised his opponent's skill.
I hope you will be magnanimous enough to excuse any incorrect behaviour on my part.
John Hess was as magnanimous as could be expected when confronted by reporters after the meeting.
The Avatar film-maker was magnanimous about his third wife's chances of winning the Academy Award.
